narrative:
Cols 76-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,216 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
